basic_details.job_title: CBHFL Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL) has published the Manager Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Manager positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 40 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC) and holding a qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) degree with relevant experience in finance, accounts, or credit underwriting are eligible to apply offline at www.cbhfl.com. The application process will be active until 06 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age up to 40 years (relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates)
age_limit.details: Maximum age up to 40 years. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) with basic knowledge of computer applications.
qualification.details: Manager (Accounts Department): Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) with basic knowledge of computer applications. Minimum 7 years overall experience. Minimum 3 years in Housing Finance Company (HFC)/NBFC/Banking sector in Finance & Accounts stream. Manager (Credit Underwriting Department): Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) with basic knowledge of computer applications. Minimum 7 years overall experience. Minimum 3 years of experience in (HFC)/NBFC/ Banking sector in Credit underwriting or Disbursement/Operation Department.

salary_details.details: Maximum Remuneration (CTC) determined based on the candidate's qualification, experience, and current CTC from the existing employer, ensuring a prudent and reasonable fit within the Company's compensation structure. Annual increment applicable as per Company's Policy.

selection_process: Selection through personal interview by Interview committee.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CBHFL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cbhfl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Manager posts at CBHFL?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Manager posts at Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL) is 06-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Manager at Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL).

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Manager post is being a Qualified Chartered Accountant (CA) with basic knowledge of computer applications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Manager post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Manager post is 40 years, with relaxations applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs.1000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for SC/ST/PWD/EWS candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST/PWD/EWS candidates is Rs.500/-.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates will be selected through a personal interview conducted by an Interview committee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Cent Bank Home Finance Limited?
faq.answer: The official website of Cent Bank Home Finance Limited is www.cbhfl.com.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for the Manager (Accounts Department) post?
faq.answer: The minimum experience required for the Manager (Accounts Department) post is 7 years overall, with at least 3 years in the Finance & Accounts stream of HFC/NBFC/Banking sector.
